zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Coney於大約1485年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓時，他的父親Thomas Coney36歲，母親Agnes Foster34歲。他和Agnes  Princess of Coney born Oldenburg至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1545年8月12日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English cony ‘rabbit’ (a back-formation from conies, from Old French conis, plural of conil), perhaps for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way or who wore rabbit skin or who sold rabbits or their skins. One York trader with this name in 1323 was a peleter or furrier.

variants.name: Cunning
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Fife): variant of Scottish or English Conning, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French coning ‘rabbit’, used for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way; perhaps also an occupational name for a furrier. See also Coney .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Coney was born about 1485, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Coney, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Foster, was 34. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Agnes  Princess of Coney born Oldenburg. He died on 12 August 1545, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Coneyが約1485年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Coneyは36歳，母Agnes Fosterは34歳であった。彼はAgnes  Princess of Coney born Oldenburgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1545年8月12日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで61歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Coney(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Coney(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Foster(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Agnes  Princess of Coney born Oldenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 8월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 커턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 커턴에 묻혔다.
